title: Harden image-build + version-bump flow from Insights report (post skills-update)
description: DEFERRED until MPI Kanban skills are updated by user. Then diff what skills already do vs the Insights-report suggestions and apply only the gaps. Build/bump hardening: v-prefix tag guard (double-v bug), post-push public pull-verify, per-image boot smoke, build card 'done' = pulled+booted. PLUS the 'forgot to bump/rebuild' net (user-requested): (A) investigate full inventory of every change-type/path needing a bump and/or image rebuild, (B) advisory PostToolUse hook that warns when a bump-trigger path is touched, (C) hook-vs-skill division. See brief.md.
